title: Job Vacancies at Alphabait Realty
content:
Alphabait Realty is a premium real estate development firm founded in 2022 and based in Abuja, Nigeria. The company focuses on developing high-value residential and multi-use projects, emphasizing artistic design, architectural innovation, and quality construction. It aims to provide both profitable investment opportunities and sustainable housing solutions.

We are recruiting to fill the following positions below:

1.) IT Officer

Job Location: Abuja (FCT) 
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary 
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a proactive and technically skilled IT Officer to manage, maintain, and support the organization’s IT infrastructure.
	The ideal candidate will ensure smooth daily IT operations, provide technical support, and implement secure and efficient systems. Experience within a real estate or property management company is highly preferred.


Key Responsibilities


	Manage and maintain the company’s IT infrastructure, including hardware, software, networks, and servers.
	Provide technical support to staff, troubleshoot system issues, and resolve IT-related problems promptly.
	Install, configure, and update computer systems, applications, and network equipment.
	Monitor system performance and ensure data security, backups, and disaster recovery processes are in place.
	Manage user accounts, access controls, and IT asset inventory.
	Support and maintain property management software and other real estate-related digital tools.
	Ensure cybersecurity measures are implemented and regularly updated to protect company data.
	Coordinate with external vendors for IT services, repairs, and procurement.
	Train staff on IT systems, tools, and best practices where necessary.
	Document IT procedures, system configurations, and troubleshooting guides.


Requirements & Qualifications


	Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field.
	Minimum of 2–4 years of experience in an IT support or administration role.
	Prior experience in a real estate company is highly important and will be an added advantage.
	Strong knowledge of networking, system administration, and cybersecurity practices.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite, Windows OS, and basic server management.
	Experience with property management software (e.g., ERP systems) is a plus.
	Good problem-solving and analytical skills.
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.


Salary
N200,000 - N300,000 per month.

Application Closing Date: 15th April, 2026.

Method of Application 
Intrerested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as subject of the mail.

 

 

2.) Architect

Job Location: Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a creative and detail-oriented Architect to design, plan, and oversee construction projects from concept to completion.
	The ideal candidate will ensure all designs are functional, safe, sustainable, and aligned with client requirements and regulatory standards.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop architectural designs, concepts, and detailed drawings.
	Prepare and present design proposals to clients and stakeholders.
	Ensure compliance with building codes, regulations, and safety standards.
	Coordinate with engineers, project managers, and contractors.
	Conduct site visits to monitor progress and ensure design accuracy.
	Review and approve architectural drawings and specifications.
	Manage project timelines and ensure deadlines are met.
	Prepare project documentation, reports, and design revisions.
	Incorporate sustainability and cost-effective solutions into designs.
	Ensure quality control throughout all stages of construction.


Requirements & Qualifications


	Bachelor’s or Master’s Degree in Architecture or related field.
	Minimum of 3–5 years of experience in architectural design and project supervision.
	Strong knowledge of architectural design principles and construction processes.
	Proficiency in design software (e.g., AutoCAD, Revit, SketchUp, ArchiCAD).
	Excellent creativity, communication, and problem-solving skills.


Certifications (Required / Preferred):


	ARCON (Architects Registration Council of Nigeria) certification / license
	Project Management Certification (PMP or Prince2) – added advantage
	Health & Safety Certification (HSE / NEBOSH) – added advantage


Salary
N200,000 - N300,000 per month.

Application Closing Date: 12th April, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

 

 

3.) Project Manager

Job Location: Kano
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking an experienced and results-driven Project Manager to oversee and deliver projects efficiently from inception to completion. The ideal candidate will be responsible for planning, coordinating, and managing resources to ensure projects are delivered on time, within scope, and within budget.


Key Responsibilities


	Plan, execute, and monitor projects to ensure timely delivery.
	Define project scope, goals, and deliverables in collaboration with stakeholders.
	Develop detailed project plans, schedules, and budgets.
	Coordinate internal teams, contractors, and external stakeholders.
	Track project performance and provide regular progress reports.
	Identify risks and implement mitigation strategies.
	Ensure compliance with industry standards, safety regulations, and company policies.
	Manage project documentation, contracts, and approvals.
	Monitor resource allocation and optimize efficiency.
	Conduct project reviews and ensure continuous improvement.


Requirements & Qualifications


	Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Construction Management, or related field.
	Minimum of 5 years of experience in project management (construction/real estate preferred).
	Strong leadership, communication, and organizational skills.
	Proficiency in project management tools (e.g., MS Project, Primavera, or similar).
	Ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously.


Certifications (Required/Preferred):


	PMP (Project Management Professional) – highly preferred
	COREN (Council for the Regulation of Engineering in Nigeria) certification
	NSE (Nigerian Society of Engineers) membership
	Prince2 Certification (added advantage)
	NEBOSH or HSE Certification (for safety compliance).


Salary
N300,000 - N350,000 per month.

Application Closing Date: 12th April, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

     

    

        Click here to Apply

Business Manager Job at Work Dey HR Services




        
    

        
        Work Dey HR Services - Our client, a fast-growing construction company, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Manager

Job Location: Apo, Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	Our client is seeking a dynamic and results-driven Business Manager to oversee operations, drive growth, and ensure the smooth running of our business activities.


Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Develop and implement business strategies to achieve company goals.
	Oversee daily operations, ensuring efficiency and compliance with industry standards.
	Manage budgets, financial planning, and reporting.
	Build and maintain strong relationships with clients, partners, and stakeholders.
	Lead and motivate teams to deliver high-quality projects on time and within budget.
	Identify new business opportunities and drive expansion initiatives.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Management, or related field (MBA is an added advantage).
	Minimum of 5 years of experience in contract procurement, project management in similar industry, Excellent communication and presentation is highly required.
	Strong leadership, organizational, and communication skills.
	Proven track record in financial management and business development.
	Ability to work under pressure and deliver results in a fast-paced environment.


Skills:


	Must have excellent IT skills in Microsoft word,excel, PowerPoint and at least 2 google workspace.


Salary
N150,000 - N250,000 / month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "HR Manager",
  "description": "TNL Pharmaceuticals is a group of registered companies with operational bases throughout Nigeria and Corporate Head Offices in Lagos, Nigeria. Established in September 1997, TNL is a member of the Pharmaceutical Manufacturing and Marketing Companies in Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: HR Manager

Job Locations:&nbsp;Abuja (FCT) and Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	We are seeking an experienced Human Resource Manager to oversee all HR functions within our organization.
	The ideal candidate must have prior experience in a sales-driven or pharmaceutical company&nbsp;and be capable of managing workforce operations in a fast-paced environment.


Key Responsibilities


	Oversee recruitment, selection, and onboarding processes
	Manage employee relations, disciplinary procedures, and conflict resolution
	Implement and monitor performance management systems (especially for sales teams)
	Coordinate staff training and development programs
	Manage compensation, payroll inputs, and sales incentive structures
	Ensure compliance with labor laws and company policies
	Maintain HR records and provide management reports


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in HR, Business Administration, or related field
	Minimum of 5 years of proven HR experience
	Mandatory experience in a Sales company or Pharmaceutical industry
	CIPM Certified
	Strong knowledge of Nigerian labor laws and HR best practices
	Experience managing field/territory staff is an advantage
	Leadership and people management
	Strong communication and interpersonal skills
	High level of professionalism and confidentiality
	Problem-solving and decision-making ability
	Ability to thrive in a target-driven environment.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;tnlrecruitment01@gmail.com&nbsp;or&nbsp;hr@tyonex.com.ng&nbsp;using &ldquo;HR Manager &ndash; Lagos/Abuja&quot;&nbsp; as the subject of the mail.",

HR Manager Job at TNL Pharmaceuticals




        
    

        
        TNL Pharmaceuticals is a group of registered companies with operational bases throughout Nigeria and Corporate Head Offices in Lagos, Nigeria. Established in September 1997, TNL is a member of the Pharmaceutical Manufacturing and Marketing Companies in Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: HR Manager

Job Locations: Abuja (FCT) and Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking an experienced Human Resource Manager to oversee all HR functions within our organization.
	The ideal candidate must have prior experience in a sales-driven or pharmaceutical company and be capable of managing workforce operations in a fast-paced environment.


Key Responsibilities


	Oversee recruitment, selection, and onboarding processes
	Manage employee relations, disciplinary procedures, and conflict resolution
	Implement and monitor performance management systems (especially for sales teams)
	Coordinate staff training and development programs
	Manage compensation, payroll inputs, and sales incentive structures
	Ensure compliance with labor laws and company policies
	Maintain HR records and provide management reports


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in HR, Business Administration, or related field
	Minimum of 5 years of proven HR experience
	Mandatory experience in a Sales company or Pharmaceutical industry
	CIPM Certified
	Strong knowledge of Nigerian labor laws and HR best practices
	Experience managing field/territory staff is an advantage
	Leadership and people management
	Strong communication and interpersonal skills
	High level of professionalism and confidentiality
	Problem-solving and decision-making ability
	Ability to thrive in a target-driven environment.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] or [email protected] using “HR Manager – Lagos/Abuja"  as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "B2B Sales Executive",
  "description": "Skache Integrated Services Limited, a Human Resources company, is recruiting suitable candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: B2B Sales Executive

Job Location:&nbsp;Magodo, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a dynamic and results-driven Sales Executive to join our team.
	The successful candidate will be responsible for generating leads, building relationships with clients, and achieving sales targets.
	This role requires excellent communication skills, a strong understanding of the product or service, and a passion for delivering exceptional customer experiences.


Key Responsibilities


	Responsible to Identify Leads/opportunity, from qualifying to closing deals
	Strongly pursue new business opportunities to achieve sales targets.
	Develop and execute sales strategies to increase revenue for the company.
	Understand the use of sales tools and methodologies to optimize results.
	Build and develop relationships with clients to understand their needs and provide tailored solutions.
	Maintain relationships with new and existing clients.
	Attend both physical and virtual meetings to close deals
	Conduct product or service presentations to potential clients, highlighting features and benefits.
	Negotiate contracts, prices, quantities, and specifications. They balance the needs of the client with the interests of the organization.
	Research the market and competition to understand what makes the Organization offering the best choice for the customer.


Positive mind-set thinking:


	Set goals and identify actions to achieve them.
	Act as the primary point of contact for clients, ensuring their needs are met.
	Address customer questions and concerns, providing tailored solutions to meet their needs.
	Ensure contracts and SLAs are accurate and in line with company policies
	Generate leads through networking, cold calling, referrals, and online platforms.


Qualifications and Skills


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in business, Marketing, or a related field (preferred).
	Has 3 years of experience in relevant Organization,
	Proven track record of success in sales in corporate environment.
	Excellent communication, negotiation, and presentation skills.
	Strong organizational and time-management skills.
	Proficiency in CRM software and Microsoft Office Suite.
	Ability to work independently with little or no supervision and as part of a team in a fast-paced environment.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their Resume to:&nbsp;jobs@skacheintegrated.com&nbsp;using the Job Posiiton as the subject of the mail.",

  "validThrough": "2026-05-01",

B2B Sales Executive Job at Skache Integrated Services Limited




        
    

        
        Skache Integrated Services Limited, a Human Resources company, is recruiting suitable candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: B2B Sales Executive

Job Location: Magodo, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a dynamic and results-driven Sales Executive to join our team.
	The successful candidate will be responsible for generating leads, building relationships with clients, and achieving sales targets.
	This role requires excellent communication skills, a strong understanding of the product or service, and a passion for delivering exceptional customer experiences.


Key Responsibilities


	Responsible to Identify Leads/opportunity, from qualifying to closing deals
	Strongly pursue new business opportunities to achieve sales targets.
	Develop and execute sales strategies to increase revenue for the company.
	Understand the use of sales tools and methodologies to optimize results.
	Build and develop relationships with clients to understand their needs and provide tailored solutions.
	Maintain relationships with new and existing clients.
	Attend both physical and virtual meetings to close deals
	Conduct product or service presentations to potential clients, highlighting features and benefits.
	Negotiate contracts, prices, quantities, and specifications. They balance the needs of the client with the interests of the organization.
	Research the market and competition to understand what makes the Organization offering the best choice for the customer.


Positive mind-set thinking:


	Set goals and identify actions to achieve them.
	Act as the primary point of contact for clients, ensuring their needs are met.
	Address customer questions and concerns, providing tailored solutions to meet their needs.
	Ensure contracts and SLAs are accurate and in line with company policies
	Generate leads through networking, cold calling, referrals, and online platforms.


Qualifications and Skills


	Bachelor’s degree in business, Marketing, or a related field (preferred).
	Has 3 years of experience in relevant Organization,
	Proven track record of success in sales in corporate environment.
	Excellent communication, negotiation, and presentation skills.
	Strong organizational and time-management skills.
	Proficiency in CRM software and Microsoft Office Suite.
	Ability to work independently with little or no supervision and as part of a team in a fast-paced environment.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their Resume to: [email protected] using the Job Posiiton as the subject of the mail.
